title: coelorachis loricata
intro: Coelorachis loricata, also known as the Loricate Coelorachis or False Papyrus, is a species of plant in the family Poaceae, native to tropical and subtropical regions of Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Coelorachis loricata include reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential uses and applications.
